originalTitle: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
summary: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.
content:
Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company. Shares of Mark Zuckerberg's social media giant jumped more than 6% Friday to the highest level since April, extending gains that began earlier this month when the company detailed plans to sell access to its AI computing capacity. On Thursday, the company launched Muse Spark 1.1, an AI coding product that will compete with Anthropic and OpenAI. Shares of Meta are flat on the year, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 is up 18%. Options traders piled in on Friday, with volume on pace for more than three times the 30-day average and 78% of the stock's $1.8 billion in options premium tied to calls, according to data from Cboe LiveVol and SpotGamma. Some of the call-buying was likely offset with selling as well, with as many calls sold as bought, but more than twice as many calls were bought compared to puts, and eight of the top 10 contracts by volume were calls as of midday.

The five most popular trades were all contracts expiring Friday afternoon, looking for a quick extension of early gains. The top trade, the $675 strike call expiring Friday, trades for about $3 per contract and needs Meta to add on another 2% by the bell. The most actively traded contract expiring after Friday is the July 17 700-strike, a trade that needs a 6% advance to break even. While bulls dominated the action in the short-term trades, at least one big trader faded the notion of a big swing in either direction. The second-biggest trade of the session was someone selling a total $29 million of both puts and calls at the 670 strike, a bet the stock will stay right where it is for the next two months.
chineseTitle: 交易者重新爱上 Meta。这是看多者所看到的方向
chineseSummary: Meta Platform 的人工智能努力看起来像是这家市值 1.7 万亿美元的公司在经历了近一年的股价低迷之后卷土重来的良方。
chineseContent:
Meta Platform 的人工智能努力看起来像是这家市值 1.7 万亿美元的公司在经历了近一年的股价低迷之后卷土重来的良方。马克·扎克伯格的社交媒体巨头的股价周五上涨超过 6%，达到 4 月份以来的最高水平，延续了本月初该公司详细出售人工智能计算能力的计划时开始的涨势。周四，该公司推出了 Muse Spark 1.1，这是一款将与 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 竞争的人工智能编码产品。 Meta 的股价与今年持平，而以科技股为主的纳斯达克 100 指数则上涨了 18%。根据 Cboe LiveVol 和 SpotGamma 的数据，周五期权交易员纷纷入场，成交量是 30 天平均水平的三倍多，该股 18 亿美元的期权溢价中有 78% 与看涨期权有关。部分看涨期权买入可能也被卖出所抵消，看涨期权的卖出数量与买入数量相同，但看涨期权的买入数量是看跌期权的两倍多，截至中午，成交量排名前 10 的合约中有 8 个是看涨期权。

五种最受欢迎​​的交易都是周五下午到期的合约，寻求快速扩大早盘涨幅。最重要的交易是周五到期的 675 美元看涨期权，每份合约的交易价格约为 3 美元，需要 Meta 在开盘前再增加 2%。周五后到期的交易最活跃的合约是 7 月 17 700 次执行合约，该交易需要上涨 6% 才能实现盈亏平衡。尽管多头在短期交易中占据主导地位，但至少一位大型交易员淡化了朝任一方向大幅波动的想法。该交易日的第二大交易是某人以 670 点行使价卖出总计 2,900 万美元的看跌期权和看涨期权，押注该股将在未来两个月保持在该水平。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
